changes.exact_quote: Requisite Holder approval is required before approving annual budgets, hiring vice presidents, entering vendor contracts above $50,000, changing product roadmaps, signing customer arrangements, or administering routine financing matters.
changes.proposed_redline: No investor approval is required for matters not listed in this Section 4.

changes.exact_quote: Investor consent is required for every budget, hire, vendor contract, and ordinary-course product decision.
changes.proposed_redline: Company may conduct ordinary-course operations without investor consent, including budgets, hiring, vendor contracts, product decisions, and routine financing administration.

changes.exact_quote: A transfer to the identified affiliate is treated as a permitted transfer even though the recipient does not agree in writing to be bound. The transferor gives administrative notice within 10 days and delivers the ministerial transfer record by day 1 after transfer.
changes.proposed_redline: Transfer restrictions do not apply to permitted transfers to affiliates, estate planning vehicles, or family members if the recipient agrees in writing to be bound by this Agreement.

changes.exact_quote: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 100,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means any single Major Investor holding at least 10% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock.
changes.proposed_redline: "Major Investor" means a holder of at least 1,000,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means Major Investors holding at least a majority of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock, voting as a single class.

summary: All eight T2-N response children reviewed against the v4 answer key.
